title: David and Goliath
director: Ferdinando Baldi, Richard Pottier, Orson Welles
writer: Umberto Scarpelli, Gino Mangini, Ambrogio Molteni
actors: Orson Welles, Ivica Pajer, Eleonora Rossi Drago
plot: King Saul of the Israelites is visited in Jerusalem by the Prophet Samuel who foretells him that a war with The Philistines is inevitable and the shepherd David will become king.
